economic_notes: Saint Mary's Economic Development Corporation accounted for under modified equity method. Retail Sales Program Operation and Leasing Company are significant revenue-generating entities.
notes: Financial statements were restated - previously issued statements dated March 17, 2024 were superseded due to a correction of deferred revenue. Audit report dated January 14, 2025. Prior year figures are restated. Net income from SMEDC was negative (-110,033) in 2023 vs positive 352,870 in 2022. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + DFO + CMHC + Province of NB + Health Canada + FNISEP = 29160638+271570+1107226+1031269+3235883+569158+0 (Community Helps Program treated as own source) = approximately 35375744; however Community Helps Program ($4,865,212) may be government transfer - adjusted total_government_transfers to include it: 40240956, osr adjusted accordingly. OSR includes Retail Sales, Leasing, Logging, Other, and SMEDC income. Remuneration schedule referenced pages 24-25 but not provided in images.
